  title System Context — iptrace

  Rel(user, iptrace, "执行 check / trace / export 命令", "CLI stdin/stdout")
  Rel(iptrace, kernel_netfilter, "读取 Netfilter NFLOG 追踪事件（在线模式）", "AF_NETLINK socket")
  Rel(iptrace, kernel_netfilter, "执行 iptables-save / iptables-nft-save 读取规则", "os/exec")
  Rel(iptrace, firewalld, "执行 firewall-cmd 读取规则", "os/exec")
  Rel(iptrace, rules_file, "加载规则快照（离线模式）", "文件 I/O")
